NALESNIKI OWOCOWE
page 47-48

Ingredients:
- 1 cup flour
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1/2 cup water
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 2 pounds fresh fruit (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries)
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- butter for pan frying
- Powdered sugar for dusting

Instructions for fruit crepes:

Batter prep: Combine flour and eggs together. Gradually add
milk and water, stirring to avoid lumps. [text broken here]
smooth batter. Season with salt. Let sit 30 minutes covered.

Heat crepe pan or 8 inch nonstick over medium-high heat.
Butter lightly. Pour 1/4 cup batter, tilt pan to spread evenly.
Cook 1-2 minutes until light golden. Flip and cook 30 seconds.
Transfer to plate. Repeat with remaining batter.

Fruit filling: Combine berries with sugar in saucepan.
Heat over medium 5-7 minutes until juices release.
Mix cornstarch with 2 tablespoons water [TEXT UNCLEAR - 47]
stir into berries. Simmer 2-3 minutes until thickened.
Remove from heat, cool slightly.

Assembly: Place crepe on work surface. Spoon 3 tablespoons
fruit filling down center. Fold crepe in half, then in
half again to form triangle. Arrange on serving plate.
Dust with powdered sugar. Serve warm or room temperature.

Serving: Top with whipped cream or sour cream dollop.
Offer with vanilla ice cream on side.

Variation: Use jam instead of fresh fruit filling.

Prep time: 45 min
Cooking time: 30 min [page break] Serves: 12-14 crepes

Storage: Stack crepes with parchment between layers.
Refrigerate 2 days or freeze 1 month. Reheat gently before serving.
